<!-- status autogenerated section -->
# In-Memory Storage Extension

The In-Memory Storage Extension provides ephemeral storage backed by process memory for components that need shared storage within the collector process.

| Status        |           |
| ------------- |-----------|
| Stability     | [alpha]   |
| Distributions | [contrib] |
<!-- end autogenerated section -->

This extension is used internally to back queue compression for the load balancing exporter. It does not persist state across collector restarts.

[alpha]: https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector/blob/main/docs/component-stability.md#alpha
[contrib]: https://github.com/open-telemetry/opentelemetry-collector-releases/tree/main/distributions/otelcol-contrib
